behavior_summary: This script manages a one-shot 'fast fall / water' effect triggered when an actor enters a special area and cleaned up when they leave.

U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea checks a global guard (hydrosFree) and a global restart guard (reStartedFall==0); if allowed it sets reStartedFall=1 and starts a replacement/animation pipeline by calling U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9.

U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9 reads coordinates from an input item, destroys that source item, creates a new item (type ~0x02E0), pops it into the world at the same coordinates, and spawns U8P_CONTWATR::func0249 to animate/drive it.

U8P_CONTWATR::func0249 is an item driver: it loops advancing the item's frame on timed yields and, on a specific frame (0x0E), spawns U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 exactly once (guarded by a local flag) and sets the driven item's frame to 0x0C.

U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 creates a secondary created item (type ~0x02E1), polls/advances its frames with timed yields, and when that item's frame reaches a particular value (0x09) it sets doneKeepFallEnd and spawns particle/effect items (type ~0x01B7) at offsets; then it adjusts the created item's frame to end the sequence.

U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea clears the global restart guard (reStartedFall=0), plays ambient music (playMusic(0x66)), and calls FREE::resetRef(0x0205h, this) to clear an external reference slot — performing cleanup and allowing retriggering.
notable_control_flow: Entry trigger -> guard hydrosFree read -> check reStartedFall == 0 -> set reStartedFall and call U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9 (one-shot start of pipeline).
U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9 replaces an item and spawns an asynchronous animator (U8P_CONTWATR::func0249) so visual progression runs independent of the entry process.
U8P_CONTWATR::func0249 advances item frames on timed yields and performs a one-shot spawn of U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 when the driven item reaches frame 0x0E (local guard local0 prevents repeat).

U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 loops with timed yields, polling a created item's frame; at frame 0x09 it optionally (if doneKeepFallEnd not set) spawns particle items and sets doneKeepFallEnd to avoid repeated particle bursts.
open_questions: What exact in-game object is the 'source item' replaced by U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9 (raw item type IDs are inferred but mapping to game assets is not explicit)?
Is hydrosFree a global player/environment state (e.g., 'water allowed') or an object-specific condition? (metadata shows it is read but not where it is set within this script).
What clears doneKeepFallEnd beyond U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 (if anything) — can this particle end-effect ever be retriggered later or is it permanently one-shot per run/session?
Some low-confidence branches and destroy calls in U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 suggest an alternate cleanup path; the purpose and triggers for that branch are uncertain.

main_function.name: U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea
main_function.purpose: Start a controlled, one-shot fall/water visual sequence when an actor enters a trigger area, guarded by hydrosFree and a global restart guard (reStartedFall).
entry_conditions: Triggered by fast-area entry (area entry event).
hydrosFree global flag must be true (read).
reStartedFall must be clear (== 0) so the sequence hasn't already started.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea
function_map.role: area-entry trigger that starts the replacement/animation pipeline (sets restart guard and calls U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9).

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea
function_map.role: area-exit cleanup: clears the global restart guard, plays music, and resets an external reference slot.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::func02C9
function_map.role: replace/transform an existing item at its coordinates, pop the new item into the world and spawn the frame-driver (U8P_CONTWATR::func0249).

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::func0249
function_map.role: item animation/driver loop that advances frames on timed yields and spawns U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 once when a milestone frame is reached.

function_map.name: U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7
function_map.role: secondary effect generator: create/pop a new item, poll its frames, spawn particle/effect items at a target frame and set doneKeepFallEnd.

internal_calls.purpose: Kick off the item replacement and animation pipeline when area is entered (one-shot starter).
Spawn the animation/driver process to advance frames for the newly created item asynchronously.
Spawn the particle/effect generator once when the driven item's frame reaches a milestone (frame 0x0E).

external_calls.purpose: Read the source item's world coordinates so the replacement item can be popped at the same location.
Remove the original/source item before creating the replacement.
Allocate the new item record (replacement type) used by the animation pipeline.
Place the created replacement item into the world at the read coordinates.
Read and set the driven item's animation frame to detect milestone and advance animation.
Create and manipulate the secondary item and particle effects, poll frames to determine when to spawn particles and when to finish.
Use FREE::func1C19 as a short-timed yield to pace frame advancement (timing helper).
Yield/pause loop timing while polling the created item's frame (timing helper).
Play ambient/transition music (id 0x66) during area exit/cleanup.
Reset/clear an external reference slot (0x0205h) associated with this object as part of cleanup.

reads.name: hydrosFree
reads.likely_effect: Environment/permission guard read at area entry; sequence only starts when true.

reads.name: doneKeepFallEnd
reads.likely_effect: Prevents repeating the particle/effect spawn; read before spawning particles in U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7.

reads.name: reStartedFall
reads.likely_effect: Read as a restart guard to prevent re-triggering the sequence when already started.

writes.name: reStartedFall
writes.likely_effect: Global restart guard written to 1 by U8P_CONTWATR::enterFastArea to mark the sequence started, cleared to 0 by U8P_CONTWATR::leaveFastArea to allow retriggering.

writes.name: doneKeepFallEnd
writes.likely_effect: Set to 1 by U8P_CONTWATR::func00E7 when the particle/effect end has been produced so it is not repeated.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: This script manages a one-shot 'fast fall / water' effect triggered when an actor enters a special area and cleaned up when they leave.
